lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows visible wear and some staining on the upholstery. Mechanically, the vehicle is functional but will require some maintenance in the near future.
The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible paint fading and a few minor dents. The interior shows wear on the seats and carpeting. All mechanical systems are functional.

Experience perfection with this absolute gem! This vehicle is in truly mint, showroom condition, looking and driving just like the day it rolled off the lot. Meticulously cared for with zero imperfections, it's a rare find for any discerning buyer seeking the absolute best.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior shows substantial wear, including multiple dents, fading paint, and several areas of surface rust. Mechanically, the engine has a noticeable knock and the transmission shifts harshly, suggesting major work is needed soon. Inside, the cabin has seen better days, with visible tears in the seating, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functional interior components. It is being sold strictly as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a complete restoration project or as a source for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It will require a significant investment of time and money to be made roadworthy. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large dents on the rear quarter panels, faded paint, and visible rust along the wheel wells and door sills. Inside, the interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery and several broken plastic trim pieces. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and the transmission is showing signs of failure, requiring immediate attention. This car is best suited for a dedicated mechanic looking for a project or for someone in need of a parts donor. Buyers should be prepared to tow the vehicle from the lot.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is nothing short of fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail has been preserved to a degree that rivals its original delivery state. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence, offered without compromise.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! 🚗✨ I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s still in total showroom condition—seriously, it’s like it just rolled off the lot. It’s been garaged its whole life and drives like an absolute dream. I'm honestly sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'm happy to chat!

Offered is a collector-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine. This high-revving powerplant utilizes individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system to deliver a linear, high-threshold power band. Mated to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, the drivetrain integrity is absolute. This specimen has received comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a reinforced rear subframe, a complete Vanos overhaul, and rod bearing replacement to ensure mechanical longevity. The chassis retains its factory-spec kinematics with crisp turn-in and neutral handling, supported by an immaculate undercarriage free of oxidation. All original VIN tags are present on the body panels, confirming a no-incident history and preserving the structural rigidity of this analog performance icon.
Pristine condition. No mechanical issues. Low mileage. Clean title. Garage kept. Inspection ready.

Offering a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features a flawless, deep ceramic-coated finish that glows under any lighting, completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero bolster wear, and the original factory scent still lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by authorized technicians. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that has been preserved with the utmost care and attention to detail. Includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a clean title in hand.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting a showroom-quality finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of the marque, representing the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically pristine, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Oh man, you have to see this car! It’s seriously in pristine condition—honestly looks and feels brand new. I’ve babied this thing since day one, keeping it garage-kept and sparkling clean. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Don't miss out on this absolute gem!

This collector-grade FD3S showcases the pinnacle of rotary engineering, featuring the sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW engine in a pristine, unmodified state. The powerplant delivers a seamless torque curve with immediate spool-up, supported by a cooling system that has been meticulously maintained to prevent heat soak. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by its original double-wishbone suspension and a perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution, while the Torsen limited-slip differential ensures optimal power delivery through the corners. Recent diagnostic logs confirm exceptional compression across all rotor faces, and the five-speed manual transmission exhibits zero synchro hesitation. With a factory-spec undercarriage and no vacuum line degradation, this specimen offers an uncompromising mechanical profile for the discerning purist.
Single owner. Garage-kept. Zero accidents. Full service records. Showroom condition interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect.

Offered here is a truly exceptional specimen, maintained to the highest standards of concours-level preservation. This vehicle boasts a flawless factory finish, free of stone chips or swirls, recently enhanced with a professional multi-stage paint correction and premium ceramic coating. The interior is indistinguishable from new; the high-grade leather bolsters show no signs of wear, and the cabin retains its original factory scent. Every electronic component functions perfectly, and the mechanical systems have been fastidiously serviced by authorized technicians with a complete paper trail included. The wheels are pristine without a single mark of curb rash, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting its life as a garage-kept weekend treasure. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a turn-key vehicle that presents and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that satisfies even the most fastidious requirements. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, showroom-quality interior, every detail underscores a commitment to excellence. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who demands peak performance paired with aesthetic perfection.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and a rigorous maintenance history. Both its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are indistinguishable from new, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total dream. This car is in flawless, showroom-ready condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it’s always been tucked away in the garage. It looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have.

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 3.2L inline-six power plant with factory-spec individual throttle bodies and a flawless double-VANOS variable valve timing system. This example is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, delivering power through a variable M differential lock for optimal mechanical grip. The chassis is in impeccable state, with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a factory-fresh suspension geometry. Every component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the pristine interior, reflects a vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. A definitive collector's piece for the purist seeking uncompromised performance and mechanical integrity.
